summary: Hardened Gitea Actions checkout steps to remove stale workspace state before pull-request validation, and added release-bundle pruning to delete older bundle releases before uploading new assets so attachment storage exhaustion does not block publishing.

verification.observed: Gitea release-bundle workflow runs 225 and 227 succeeded on `codex/ws-0315-gitea-followups`, confirming old bundle releases are pruned before publishing new assets.
Gitea validate workflow reruns 228 (PR 7) and 229 (PR 6) started from clean checkouts; failures now cite repository data model mismatches instead of incomplete workspaces.
`pytest -q tests/test_gitea_workflows.py tests/test_renovate_automation.py tests/test_gitea_runtime_role.py` returned `25 passed in 0.91s`.
`python3 scripts/release_bundle.py validate` returned status ok with 2659 tracked files.

notes: The private Gitea release-bundle attachment store previously exhausted storage; pruning old bundle releases prevents recurring failures without removing the new release assets.
A stale Renovate PR validation run reported an incomplete checkout; the checkout now removes leftover workspace contents before fetching to avoid drift.
PR validation reruns for PRs 6 and 7 still fail because the image digest expectations in the data model do not match the Renovate branch contents.
